concept: Please make me a game where players control a chameleon with the ability to blend perfectly with backgrounds but only while completely motionless. Moving instantly reveals the player to prowling predators, requiring careful timing between camouflaged planning and rapid movement execution. The environment features color-coded insects that grant temporary special abilities when consumed, such as extended jump distance or brief invisibility while moving. Players must navigate through increasingly complex ecosystems with diverse predator types featuring different sensory capabilities beyond just vision. The ultimate goal is to reach a legendary rainbow tree said to grant permanent evolutionary adaptations to any creature that can overcome its guardian challenges.
